query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS uptimeChecks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('up', 'down', 'degraded') NOT NULL,
  responseTime INT NOT NULL,
  databaseCheck BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
  apiCheck BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
  memoryCheck BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
  errors TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_timestamp (timestamp DESC),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user c2qSkVB4gKtEmor.bc3c8c9ce52a --database VzNbWtRJAsr2zJAegEjRtX --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS uptimeChecks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('up', 'down', 'degraded') NOT NULL,
  responseTime INT NOT NULL,
  databaseCheck BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
  apiCheck BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
  memoryCheck BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
  errors TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_timestamp (timestamp DESC),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
)
